## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Apriora and GrowthX to discuss potential collaboration on content marketing and SEO initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered content creation and SEO services, with a focus on high-quality, persona-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Their process involves a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($20-30K) followed by ongoing growth execution ($9-25K/month)](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=33.0)
  - [Typical results include notable traffic increases by month 3, with more significant gains and insights by month 5-6](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Apriora is undergoing a rebrand to alex.com and seeking help with content strategy and potentially messaging](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Approach and Services

  - [Combines AI-powered workflows with human expertise (managing editors)](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Focus on creating high-quality, persona-driven content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Services include strategy development, content creation, imagery, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=758.0)
  - [Typical engagement: 6-8 week strategy sprint, followed by ongoing growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)
  - [Platform features workflows for research, outlines, content generation, and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

### Content Strategy and Creation Process

  - [Develop deep persona understanding and content strategy artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Create content roadmaps (6-12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1250.0)
  - [Daily content publishing (5-15 pieces/week, depending on client needs)](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1156.0)
  - [Programmatic content creation for scalable opportunities (e.g., Ramp's per diem pages)](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Continuous refinement based on performance data and client feedback](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1643.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Structure

  - [Strategy sprint: Starts at $20K for 8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Growth execution: $9K-$25K/month, depending on content volume and complexity](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1103.0)
  - [Typical mid-range engagement: $12K-$15K/month for \~10-15 editorial pieces/week](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)

### Results and Timelines

  - [First notable traffic uptick typically seen around month 3 post-publishing](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [More significant gains and deeper insights usually apparent by months 5-6](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=934.0)
  - [Careful, strategic approach to scaling content, especially for programmatic plays](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1965.0)

### Apriora's Specific Situation

  - [Recently hired Don to help with growth and marketing efforts](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Undergoing a rebrand from Apriora to alex.com](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
  - [Seeking assistance with content strategy and potentially messaging refinement](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1257.0)
  - [Currently using Vapy for some website features](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1866.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Follow-up meeting scheduled for Thursday at 2 PM Pacific](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Kyle to send invitation for Friday's workshop (2-hour deep dive into GrowthX)](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Kyle to provide materials for Don to share with Apriora's CEO](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1509.0)
  - [Explore potential opportunities for collaboration in the next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
  - [Discuss approach for Apriora's rebranding to alex.com](https://fathom.video/share/EET4iivRYVeg9rzTw2Z71xexeHvzDTvc?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)
